title: stelis polyantha
intro: Stelis polyantha is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It is known for its small, white flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues, such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Stelis polyantha can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or poultice, and is also used in folk remedies for its antiseptic and expectorant properties.
